Video.summary: Rick Hunter's back. He's considering marrying his girlfriend. But before he could, she is murdered.
Video.title: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Image.alt: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Video.summary: Stan's fiance is a robbery suspect; Rachel puts the family on a healthy diet.
Video.title: All That Glitters

Video.summary: Racial tensions flare when Tony's old friend refuses to cast his city council vote in favor of a hard-line Japanese businessman intent on buying up prime Eastbridge property.
Video.title: Rising Sun

Video.summary: Suspicion arises when a Bel Air housewife refuses to identify the man who stole her million-dollar necklace.
Video.title: Hot Prowl

Video.summary: Tony's babysitter accuses a local football hero of rape.
Video.title: Hero

Video.summary: A heart destined for a young girl's transplant is stolen; Cyd tracks a larcenous Santa.
Video.title: A Little Heart

Video.summary: Tony tries to help Benny, Rachel's hapless used-car dealer cousin, extricate himself from the grip of a notorious drug trafficker. Meanwhile, Tony is becoming disheartened thinking that no one cares about his impending 40th birthday.
Video.title: Benny

Video.summary: When Hunter investigates a drug ring, his ex-partner becomes a suspect in the murder of the dealers.
Video.title: Renegade

Video.summary: Commissioner Scali and his team of officers pull out all stops as they try to beat the clock in a desperate search for the kidnapper of a very sick baby.
Video.title: The Sharp Pinch

Video.summary: Investigating the death of Hunter's former girlfriend - did she jump or was she pushed from a highrise window?
Video.title: Allegra

Video.summary: Tony suspects foul play when a member of a commando-like squad of elite prep-school students -- perpetrators of a series of break-in thefts -- disappears.
Video.title: Dead Cadet's Society

Video.summary: When Hunter disappears during an investigation, McCall and her new partner must find him before he's killed.
Video.title: Shades

Video.summary: McCall fears that Hunter's temper will outweigh his judgement when his former girlfriend is murdered.
Video.title: Crossfire

Video.summary: McCall is shot and paralyzed after learning about a prostitution ring operating in a fleet of motor homes.
Video.title: Hot Pursuit, Part 1

Video.summary: As doctors prepare to operate on McCall, Hunter races to find whoever is killing potential witnesses.
Video.title: Hot Pursuit, Part 2

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate the death of a reporter and uncover a plot involving a wealthy industrialist.
Video.title: Turning Point

Video.summary: Detective Doyle helps investigate the real life murder of an actress-turned-prostitute who was cut in half.
Video.title: The Black Dahlia

Video.summary: Cyd suspects her ex-boyfriend of harassment; Tony pursues a mother-son bank-robbing team.
Video.title: Dying Affection

Video.summary: Tony investigates the death of a wealthy heiress; computerization of the Scali's bank account causes havoc.
Video.title: Mansion

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate the death of a famous actress and meet her sister, hungry for the inheritance.
Video.title: Naked Justice, Part 1

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby get more than they gambled for when they head to Las Vegas in pursuit of an escaped bank robber suffering from multiple personalities.
Video.title: Cop For A Day

Video.summary: Bobby gets a new lesson in fear when he heads up to Santa Barbara State College after a serial killer responsible for the disappearance of 5 coeds.
Video.title: Stalker's Moon

Video.summary: Reno tackles a new profession while trying to flush out the killer of 3 "Repo Men".
Video.title: Repo Raines

Video.summary: Reno attempts to capture a murderer while meeting with a local Real Estate dealer, which results in the real estate dealer's death during a gunfire exchange.
Video.title: Ace In The Hole

Video.summary: Reno finds himself in a precarious situation when he becomes the latest target of a bounty hunter known as a "living legend" as well as Bobby's teacher and mentor.
Video.title: Living Legend
